customHandlers.itunesSearchHandler: function(ctx) { let fetchJson = (url) => { let resp = req(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0' } }); return JSON.parse(resp.content); }; let keyword = encodeURIComponent(ctx.wd); let url = `https://itunes.apple.com/search?term=${keyword}&limit=30&entity=song`; let json = fetchJson(url); let results = json.results || []; return results.map(item => ({ vod_id: item.previewUrl, vod_name: `${item.trackName} - ${item.artistName}`, vod_pic: item.artworkUrl100 || 'https://picsum.photos/200/300', vod_remarks: `🎵 试听 (${(item.trackTimeMillis/1000).toFixed(0)}秒)` })); }
customHandlers.localLiveSearchHandler: function(ctx) { let fetchTxt = (url) => { let resp = req(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0' } }); return resp.content; }; let url = ctx.source.liveUrl; let content = fetchTxt(url); let lines = content.split('\n'); let results = []; for (let line of lines) { line = line.trim(); if (!line || line.startsWith('#')) continue; let parts = line.split(','); if (parts.length >= 2) { let title = parts[0].trim(); let playUrl = parts[1].trim(); if (title.toLowerCase().includes(ctx.wd.toLowerCase())) { results.push({ vod_id: playUrl, vod_name: title, vod_pic: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300', vod_remarks: '直播' }); } } } return results; }
